title: Implement API gateway v2 config schema
description: Forge manages the gateway config. Atlas is planning their own gateway migration (ATL-201) for the same quarter with no joint plan. Risk of conflicting changes to the same infrastructure.

title: Launch developer portal v2
description: Self-service onboarding, team catalog, runbook search. Uses Nova design system but StatusIndicator was built custom — not aligned with Nova's Badge component.

title: Migrate all teams to new deployment pipeline
description: New pipeline requires teams to update their CI config. Phoenix and Horizon have not started migration yet.
